Video.summary: The unexpected arrival of men from Rose's criminal past threatens her happiness.
Video.title: Thorn of the Rose

Video.summary: Jim Bridger returns from an Army assignment to learn his life at home has changed drastically.
Video.title: Old Gabe

Video.summary: As their crops dry out, desperate farmers seek help from the owner of a hydraulic mining machine.
Video.title: The Talking Wire

Video.summary: An injured man harbors ill intent for the trading post owners offering him shelter.
Video.title: Valley of Danger

Video.summary: Russian Grand Duke Alexis is touring the West and the government assigns Buffalo Bill as his guide.
Video.title: The Grand Duke

Video.summary: After a skirmish with hostile Natives, prisoners arrive at the fort, including an ill girl.
Video.title: Indian Emily

Video.summary: A failed and widowed prospector buys a goat farm to support his family - and stumbles upon gold.
Video.title: One Man Tank

Video.summary: A drifter befriends a boy whose father has been jailed for horse theft.
Video.title: The Man on the Road

Video.summary: A nun who tries to help an injured boy finds herself in trouble with the law.
Video.title: The Wind at Your Back

Video.summary: Matt Denby faces severe bad luck: his son is bitten by a rabid animal and his wife leaves him.
Video.title: The Madstone

Video.summary: A tenderfoot teams with a prospector who is quick to live up to his reputation as a jinx.
Video.title: Gamble with Death

Video.summary: Dr. Allen Camden investigates the murder of likeable shopkeeper Grant Noble.
Video.title: Dead Man's Tale

Video.summary: Buff McCloud runs a Nevada town with an iron fist - until a stranger arrives.
Video.title: Forty Steps to Glory

Video.summary: A miner discovers a vein rich in ore near his claim after giving half of his stake to a singer.
Video.title: Ten Feet of Nothing

Video.summary: Townspeople unite against a couple who refuse to carry guns and fight.
Video.title: Devil's Bar

Video.summary: Saloonkeeper Shanghai Kelly kidnaps crewmen for understaffed ships.
Video.title: Shanghai Kelly's Birthday Party

Video.summary: A recent widower wants a headstone.
Video.title: The Lone Grave

Video.summary: A tomboy changes her ways when she meets the handsome constable of a mining town.
Video.title: The Indiana Girl

Video.summary: An inexperienced young man hears about a planned ambush on the sheriff and vows to help.
Video.title: The Friend

Video.summary: Jesse Martin stirs up a town: he claims there's a payload of gold lying right beneath Main Street.
Video.title: Gold Mine on Main Street

Video.summary: The story of how the Winchester repeating rifle helped to bring law and order to a new Idaho town.
Video.title: The Thirty-Caliber Town

Video.summary: A miner invests his life savings on a tip from a dying criminal.
Video.title: The Secret of the Black Prince

Image.alt: The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince

Video.summary: Sandy King, the youngest member of an outlaw gang, is wounded.
Video.title: A Mule... Like the Army's Mule

Image.alt: A Mule... Like the Army's Mule
A Mule... Like the Army's Mule
A Mule... Like the Army's Mule
A Mule... Like the Army's Mule
A Mule... Like the Army's Mule
A Mule... Like the Army's Mule
A Mule... Like the Army's Mule
A Mule... Like the Army's Mule
A Mule... Like the Army's Mule

Video.summary: A teacher engaged to a minister tries to conceal her gambling.
Video.title: Lottie's Legacy

Video.summary: An alcoholic tries to sober up long enough to save the lives of his friend and his niece.
Video.title: Solomon's Glory

Video.summary: Renegade Natives led by a white man named Clay threaten the residents of a decommissioned fort.
Video.title: Long Night at Fort Lonely

Video.summary: A frontier couple battle Natives, outlaws and a government-issued land grant to save their ranch.
Video.title: Here Stands Bailey

Video.summary: Best friends recently out of the U.S. Army use a card game to determine a decision about marriage.
Video.title: A Full House

Video.summary: Two outlaws devise a mining operation and finance it with stolen bullion.
Video.title: How to Beat a Badman

Video.summary: Lucia Darling moves to Montana to start a school but faces many challenges.
Video.title: Lucia Darling and the Ostrich

Video.summary: The honeymoon is over when Jim Dayton's wife stumbles onto his past.
Video.title: Jimmy Dayton's Bonanza

Video.summary: A Mormon leader is determined to enforce God's law with a gun.
Video.title: Son of Thunder

Video.summary: A physician courts disaster by aiding one of two feuding Natives.
Video.title: The Lady Doctor

Video.summary: A young woman flirts with a ranch hand while waiting for a proposal from her beau.
Video.title: Pioneer Pluck

Video.summary: Natives reject Christianity in this biographical tale of missionary priest Jean Baptiste Lamy.
Video.title: Saint of Travelers

Video.summary: Father de la Cuesta is curious why a deceased padre ordered a hand organ for the mission.
Video.title: A Gift from Father Tapis

Video.summary: John Clum is given a task of turning a group of Apache men into a force that aids the U.S. Calvary.
Video.title: Clum's Constabulary

Video.summary: A cook skims gold nuggets off miners while working at their camp and faces the penalty of hanging.
Video.title: Early Candle Lighten

Video.summary: The Chumash Natives, enslaved by Spanish soldiers in California, rebel against their captors.
Video.title: Let My People Go

Video.summary: Count Peter intends to wed a don's daughter, but a misunderstanding lands him in hot water.
Video.title: Count Me In, Count Me Out

Image.alt: Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out

Video.summary: A land manager tries to outfox two women attempting to rightfully claim their property.
Video.title: By the Book

Video.summary: Rachel Barrett's act of kindness toward an injured Native leads to her family's capture.
Video.title: A Gift

Video.summary: After a trip to town, two miners find gold nuggets mixed with beans they bought.
Video.title: The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt

Image.alt: The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt
The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt
The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt

The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt

The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt
The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt

Video.summary: A cowboy and a Native man join forces to secure dowries for their sweethearts.
Video.title: Amos and the Black Bull

Video.summary: Red Eagle and Little Fawn fight an unscrupulous businessman to secure an army freight contract.
Video.title: The Contract
